title: Runtime config staged reconcile and report network-only gate docs
problem: Ticket-224 documented deterministic reconcile/report in README/AGENTS, but docs/agents/12_RUNTIME_CONFIG.md lacks explicit RECONCILE/REPORT network-gate rows and the no-live-LLM boundary in the staged gate matrix.
acceptance_criteria: 12_RUNTIME_CONFIG.md documents RGE_ALLOW_LIVE_STAGED_RECONCILE and RGE_ALLOW_LIVE_STAGED_REPORT as network spine gates only (no live LLM counterpart).
Staged gate matrix distinguishes per-step live Ollama rows (extract/link/build/detect) from deterministic reconcile/report steps.
.env.example comments clarify reconcile/report are network-only (no *_LIVE_LLM gate).
non_goals: New LLM tasks or fallthrough flags.
category: Phase 3 / live LLM / staged spine documentation
